content.full_text:
October 1, 2003

William H. Wainwright, Councilmember
Martinez City Council
1153 Hillside Drive
Martinez, CA 94553

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-223

Dear Mr. Wainwright:

Thank you for returning my telephone call today. As I indicated in our conversation, the Commission is unable to comply with your request for formal written advice within the 24-hour time frame you required. As I explained, since the agenda item is going forward today, we must decline your request for advice after-the-fact since that would amount to advice on past conduct. (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed). Accordingly, we are withdrawing your request for advice.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Staff Counsel

Enclosure
